title: Decide the GPT connector probe consumer and cadence
goal: Name the actual consumer and freshness contract for the hourly GPT connector probe, then either version and retain it at a justified cadence or retire it after an external connector canary.

acceptance.assertion: A named local or external consumer and the exact fields it consumes are evidenced, or the lane is explicitly classified unconsumed after an external canary.
If retained, probe source and systemd units are versioned in a named canonical repository with release identity and drift checks.
The cadence follows a documented freshness requirement instead of historical activation timing.
If retired, current units are captured, rollback is explicit and at least one external connector canary plus one missed-cycle observation shows no loss of readiness evidence.
